## Type of change

## Testing

## Checklist

- [ ] Conventional commit message (`feat:`, `fix:`, `docs:`, …)
- [ ] `cargo fmt --all` and `cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings` clean
- [ ] Public API changes are documented
- [ ] CHANGELOG updated if this is a user-visible change
